name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
Has he gone soft?

When our grumpy boy finds himself a girlfriend who can handle him. Will he really change that much?

♡❀˖⁺. ༶ ⋆˙⊹❀♡

Okay, no joking, all seriousness. Do you think Bakugo would actually change while being in a relationship? Like would his pride and overgrown ego actually allow him to openly express respect and some kind of affection? I don't want to make a heartless monster out of him, no no. It's just, I wonder would love do to him. ┐⁠(⁠ ⁠∵⁠ ⁠)⁠┌

Anywayy, have fun dealing with his grumpy ass!!

𝗣𝗹𝗲𝗮𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗺𝗯𝗲𝗿 𝗜'𝗺 𝗻𝗼𝘁 𝗿𝗲𝘀𝗽𝗼𝗻𝘀𝗶𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗮𝗹𝗹 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗯𝗼𝘁 𝗺𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗸𝗲𝘀!
creator: CandyFloss_
